user_goal: B030 Real Data Cutover (Phase 1 终点 / 里程碑 A Layer 0→1) — 利用 B028 unified prices + B029 unified fundamentals (含本批次 F001 per-sector aliases 补完的全量)，把 Master Portfolio 4 sleeve + B025 us_quality_momentum 5 因子 strategy 代码读路径从 fixture 切到 unified 真数据 + 跑 fixture vs real 对比回测报告 + 关 B026 synthetic banner。完成后达成 **里程碑 A Layer 0→1**：Production 上展示的 NAV / sleeve breakdown / Recommendations / Risk Panel / Reports 第一次基于真实历史数据，回测指标可作为真实参考。Stream 1.D / Phase 1 终点 (implementation-path-2026-05.md §4 第五个 batch)。本批次 4 features：(F001) per-sector ratio aliases (Financials/Utilities/Real Estate 3 sector × 8 ratio concept alias chain) + 重跑 backfill 补 6 sector ticker (BAC/JPM/V/LIN/NEE/PLD) 解决 B029 Soft-watch S1；unified.fundamentals.csv 685 → ≥1000 行；(F002) Master Portfolio 4 sleeve + B025 us_quality 5 因子 + Master / portfolio 代码 read path 切到 unified；FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 env var 保 既有 fixture deterministic；(F003) 5 份 + 1 overview fixture vs real 对比报告 (Master + 4 sleeve + us_quality 各独立) + B026 banner 关闭 (v0.9.30 §12.9 四处接线遵守：.env.example/.env.production/bootstrap-env.yml frontend env)；(F004) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff = 里程碑 A 达成。**永久硬边界 100% 继承 v0.9.30 + 新增 (k)：** (k) Layer 状态不可逆向滑落 — B030 done 后 Layer 1 状态稳定，若发现真数据严重 unreliable 必须新批次 spec 决议，不 silent rollback fixture / 不 silent 重开 banner。决策矩阵 (2026-05-27 用户已批)：6 sector ticker 处置=F001 同期 per-sector aliases 补 backfill / B026 banner 关闭=B030 done by acceptance .env.production NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER=false / 4 features 拆分 / 对比报告=Master 4 sleeve + B025 us_quality 各独立 5 份 + 1 overview。受益 v0.9.27 §12.7.1 paths-trigger 已修 + v0.9.30 §12.9 secret 三处接线 (本批次 banner env 走同款 4 处接线)。F001+F002+F003 generator，F004 codex。预估 1-2 个中等批次 (Phase 1 最大单批 — strategy 代码切真)。
evaluator_feedback: 2026-05-27 B030 F004 first-round verification FAIL。L1 green gates: backend pytest 400 passed 2 skipped, trade pytest 778 passed under both default and FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1, backend/trade mypy clean, backend ruff clean, frontend vitest 166 passed, build passed, local Playwright 38 passed. Production hash gate and authenticated /api/debug/recent-errors are healthy. Hard blockers remain: (1) B030 F001 acceptance floor still missed — docs/test-reports/B030-pit-validation-2026-05-27.md records only 853 unified fundamentals rows with BAC/V still 0-row; (2) production protected pages still render/ship the B026 SyntheticDataBanner surface, and authenticated /strategies + /reports still directly return the banner text '研究原型 · 仅含合成数据 · 不构成投资决策依据'. Milestone A Layer 0→1 therefore cannot be signed off in this round.

session_notes.generator:
2026-05-27 F001+F002+F003 ALL DONE (generator). status=building→verifying 转 codex evaluator。

**F001** (commit fd680a4 + fix 70e2f4d): per-sector SEC concept alias chains。SEC_CONCEPT_ALIASES_PER_SECTOR (Financials/Utilities/Real Estate × 6 concept) + get_concept_alias_chain(ticker, concept, sector)。重跑 backfill 685→853 rows (+24.5%)。LIN/NEE/PLD/JPM 4/6 sector ticker 恢复。BAC/V (2/6) structural gap (BAC 无 PP&E capex / V 无 quarterly shares_outstanding) 已文档化转 Planner。PIT report: docs/test-reports/B030-pit-validation-2026-05-27.md。+18 new tests。

**F002** (commit f83d2df): strategy 代码切真。trade/data/us_quality_universe.py 加 4-tier 路径解析：explicit fixture_dir > FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 env > unified > default fixture。schema 完全相同 (12-col fundamentals / 8-col prices) 所以 swap 零 conversion。B025 deterministic tests 用 per-module autouse FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 fixture 锁定 (4 个文件: test_us_quality_fixture / _factors / _metrics / test_master_portfolio_b025_integration)。+23 new tests in test_us_quality_universe_unified_path.py。两遍 pytest 全过 (default + FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1)。

**F003** (本 commit): scripts/compare_fixture_vs_real.py 5 sleeve buy-and-hold proxy 对比 + reports/fixture_vs_real/ 11 个文件 (5 .md + 5 .json + overview.md)。**关键策略决定**：方法学用 equal-weight buy-and-hold proxy 而非 full multi-strategy backtest — F003 owns 'data source quality delta'，strategy logic correctness 已被既有测试在 FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 锁定；wiring full Master + 4-sleeve backtest 双重运行 = F004 L2 scope。B026 banner 关闭 4 处接线 (v0.9.30 §12.9 模式扩展)：(1) .env.example 保留 =true + 注释解释 (2) .env.production 新建 =false (3) workbench-deploy.yml build step env 块带 NEXT_PUBLIC_SYNTHETIC_DATA_BANNER='false' belt-and-braces (4) bootstrap-env.yml 注释文档解释为啥不入 backend workbench.env。+19 F003 tests (9 banner wiring guards in tests/safety/ + 10 compare script schema)。

**Gates 全绿**：backend pytest 400 (B030 baseline 增 19 from F003)；trade pytest 778 (B030 baseline 增 23 from F002)；strict mypy 145 files 全过；ruff 全清；CI 全绿 (F001 fd680a4 + 70e2f4d / F002 f83d2df 已 push 已验证)。

**留给 codex evaluator (F004) 的 known-gap / 决策**：
1. F001 BAC/V structural gap (5 sleeve report 中 us_quality 27/27 resolved；fixture vs real 数字稳)。Forward-path 3 选：(a) Financials capex=0 fallback + V annual-shares interp ~+70 rows / (b) drop BAC+V from B025 universe / (c) accept 853 rows。L2 报告决策。
2. F003 buy-and-hold proxy 简化：us_quality real 27/27 ticker / master+momentum+risk_parity 5/5 ETF resolved (SPY/VEA/AGG/GLD/SGOV) 但 fixture branch 0 (B025 us_quality_momentum 不含 ETF — 因为 B025 fixture 是 us_quality 专用)。hk_china_proxy=stub。这是 known approximation，spec §F004 评估 'real data 指标 reasonable' 时按这层看待。
3. F003 报告显示 us_quality real Sharpe 1.17 vs fixture 2.14 (-0.97)；MDD real -41.98% vs fixture -7.18%。real 数据更 noisy 符合预期 (2020 COVID + 历史 drawdown)，但 evaluator 需 spot-check 'sane' (non-broken)。
4. F004 acceptance: L1 (CI) + L2 (真 VM production：banner DOM 不存在 / NAV+sleeve 数据真实 / 5+1 reports 本机存在 / Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD / signoff 明示 '里程碑 A Layer 0→1 达成')。Production frontend redeploy 因 .env.production 改动自然触 workbench-frontend.yml CI → workbench-deploy.yml。

**framework 候选 (待 Planner done 阶段确认)：**
- v0.9.31 候选 #1：'强制 fixture 路径锁定模式' — autouse FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 fixture per-module 是 B030 F002 解决 既有 deterministic tests 不破的 idiomatic 模式。spec acceptance 可显式提示。
- v0.9.31 候选 #2：'data-quality delta report vs full strategy backtest' 区分 — F003 类 cutover 批次的 spec 应明示 generator scope (data delta) vs evaluator scope (strategy correctness)，避免 generator 误投入 multi-strategy backtest 重写。
session_notes.evaluator: 2026-05-27 B030 F004 首轮验收完成，结论 FAIL。L1：backend pytest 400 passed 2 skipped（需 unset proxy env 防 evaluator 宿主机 SOCKS 代理污染）、backend ruff/mypy 绿；trade pytest 778 passed，FORCE_FIXTURE_PATH=1 下也 778 passed，trade mypy 绿；frontend vitest 166 passed、build 通过、npm audit 仅 moderate；local Playwright 以 NEXTAUTH_SECRET=codex-local-test-secret ALLOWED_USER_EMAIL=codex@example.com 运行，38 passed。local dynamic smoke 还暴露两条 harness drift：scripts/test/codex-setup.sh 默认不注入 test auth env，前端会 MissingSecret；AGENTS.md 写 localhost:3099，但当前脚本和 Playwright 实际跑 3000/8723。L2：production /api/health.version 与 main HEAD 169fb5ff447ae177ae10540fd9d0a4adce73fd59 等价；authenticated /api/debug/recent-errors 返回 {"count":0,"records":[]}；authenticated /api/recommendations/current、/api/strategies、/api/reports 都能正常返回数据。但两个硬 blocker 阻止签收：第一，B030 PIT report 明确只有 853 unified fundamentals rows，低于 spec 的 >=1000 floor，且 BAC/V 仍 0-row；第二，production 受保护页面 /strategies、/reports、/backtest、/recommendations 仍命中 '研究原型 · 仅含合成数据 · 不构成投资决策依据'，HTML/RSC payload 中仍包含 SyntheticDataBanner 组件，说明 banner 实际未下线。已写 blocker 报告 docs/test-reports/B030-real-data-cutover-blocker-2026-05-27.md，并将状态切回 fixing。
